reviews.review_description:
I can't do any damage to super villan
With my fire

This game has potential, but it needs one major and a few regular adjustments before it gets to where it could be. The first enemy is a giant spider who can hurt you for 10 of your 100 health. Once you have the fire ability, you can continuously damage the spider. A problem quickly occurs when the player learns that the spider is much faster than them, the fire damage is basically nothing compared to the damage output of the spider, and the spider's attacks can't be blocked. This is simply a challenge for the player to overcome, but the game has only two ways to kill the bug: the player has to take advantage of what feels like an error in the game's design by spinning in slow motion while attacking to prevent the spider from making contact by the smallest amount or find an alley that is too small for the spider, but large enough for the player. This can be resolved by extending the flame far enough for the player to have a fighting chance or by replacing the initial time control with flight, teleportation, or super speed. The spider shouldn't be easily defeated, but there has to be a fighting chance that doesn't require thinking about cheating the design. That issue resolved and applied to other enemies would greatly improve this game and its remaining fixes would only be a polishing of the map, abilities, and menu. If a power switch happens and flight takes the initial spot, the spider will need to be given a ranged attack to keep it from being too easy. This game can be something, please keep working on it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the constructive criticism :) I will now see what I can do due to popular demand :)

I haven’t even played yet, but the super powers seem hella lit, a lot of these idiots are saying bAd it’s a challenging game so it’s gonna be fun, we need games like these, edit: well I can’t find a building to kill the super villain it’s really hard lol, fun game though

developer_response.body: Sorry for very late reply, for anyone with similar troubles, the building with the correct roof angle to reflect the supervillain's laser is 1 of 2 identical skyscrapers with angled roofs which are close together and facing each other :)

reviews.review_description: So you begin with the ability to stop time for 6 seconds, which is later replaced with fire from the hand. The only way I observed to kill to giant alien spider was to spin in circles to avoid it's cluches meanwhile baking it's head with the fire from my hand. Of course the real world spinning caught up...all I can think of now is to delete your game, sorry.

developer_response.body: No worries :) For those having problems with the spider, there should be 3 hints for it, one after every 2 deaths in version 1.0.1 (hints used to appear every 200 seconds in version 1.0, every 2 deaths now should be more regular and easy to get to). The 3rd and final clue for the spider recommends a safe spot to shoot from: to lure it to the alleyway between two buildings, which is the opposite side of the road to the modern white artsy building, to the left of the starting spot of the spider. As you head towards the modern white artsy building, the two buildings with an alleyway between them are to your left. You will be safely out of reach in this alleyway :) I hope this helps :)

reviews.review_description: Has the Oculus Store completely given up on any kind of quality control whatsoever? That's what you're asking yourself after trying Super Simulator for ten minutes. I would be more forgiving if Super Simulator would clearly state that it's an early beta version that someone has clearly coded in his bedroom over the weekend, but it doesn't. I don't even know where to begin reviewing it. Just about every aspect of this game is sub-par.  Controls, movement, collision detection, object rendering, you name it...

reviews.review_title: Web slinging doesn't work for me
reviews.review_description: I'm having a problem with web slinging. I use an oculus go controller but even trying to remap the controls it still doesn't work and instead makes me jump. Other than that it's a fun game!

developer_response.body: Web slinging is only unlocked after defeating the alien spider, prior to that the trigger button is an extra jump button as it's a lot easier to jump with the trigger while beating the spider :)

reviews.review_description: Alright so this game is so fun thank you to whoever made this game so the spider level is easy go in slow mo jump on top of it and use the fire to kill it then level 2 i didnt beat it yet cause i got it today but how am i supposed to beat it i dont know im trying to distract him and shoot fire at him but i cant, please fix this thank you.

I've tried playing this several times. The Go controller is too difficult to use with this game. A gamepad works better but still confusing when you're adjusting to a gamepad instead of the Go. There has to be a better way,... Easier functions.
